provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models the model asking to disambiguate an underspecified request instead of calling.

request_tools.name: send_message
request_tools.description: Send a chat message to a recipient or channel.

raw_output: Quick check before I send this: did you mean to post it to the whole team channel, or just direct-message Sam? Those go to very different audiences, so I want to make sure I get the recipient right.
note: The recipient is genuinely ambiguous between a channel and a person, so the model correctly asks rather than guessing; picking one would risk sending to the wrong audience, so no_tool is correct.
